title: Button Click on Public Link

posts.author: cp40 (Claire Phillippi)
posts.cookedHtml: When I create a link to share with people outside our organization is there a way to allow for button click interactivity? Meaning, if I have a button column, and someone is viewing the board via a share/public link, I’d like them to click on a button in the button column and trigger a notification automation. Is this possible?
